description_long: This is a stone pedestal monument featuring a bust of a man atop a square column. The front face of the pedestal bears an inscription: 'D. MANUEL DE VEGA Y LOPEZ 1834-1885', indicating the commemorated individual and his lifespan. The rear face of the pedestal is inscribed with 'INAUGURADO 11-3-1986', marking the inauguration date. The sides of the pedestal are decorated with vertical recessed panels, and the bust is rendered in a realistic style, showing detailed facial features and attire. The entire structure is made of a light-colored stone, giving it a dignified and formal appearance. The monument is designed to be a fixed, commemorative feature in a public or urban space.
description: A stone pedestal monument with a realistic bust of a man and inscribed commemorative plaques. The structure is formal, with detailed engravings and a light stone finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bust and the main inscription with the name and dates of D. Manuel De Vega y Lopez.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the profile of the bust and the plain, vertically paneled side of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bust and the inscription 'INAUGURADO 11-3-1986' on the pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view with the bust in profile and the plain, vertically paneled side of the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: bust of D. Manuel De Vega y Lopez
attribute_location_context: No specific context visible, but the monument is suited for outdoor urban or park settings.
